page_title: Groundwork of EVANGELION: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon A Time 02
text:
is a full color artbook published by Groundworks Co., ltd. on 11 November 2022. It features the original drawings of the film Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon A Time. https://www.evastore.jp/shop/g/gZ0000110/
